title: Produce a comparable Trend signal
description: Deferred until private evidence establishes exact comparable-window rules across stable category identity, plan revisions, corrections, and coverage changes. Goal trace: G3.
rationale: A raw difference is not a trustworthy trend when category or evidence identity changed.
story_want: compare explicit windows only when their evidence is genuinely comparable
story_so_that: category or correction drift cannot masquerade as behavior change
acceptance_criteria: Given a released Trend policy and comparable explicit windows with stable identities, when Trend is evaluated, then both exact metrics, window bounds, comparison operation, policy version, coverage, and limitations are returned.
Given category rename with unchanged stable identity and otherwise comparable evidence, when Trend is evaluated, then rename alone does not invalidate comparison.

Given identity replacement, unproven lifecycle continuity, incompatible policy, or materially incomplete coverage, when Trend is requested, then Incomparable Baseline is returned and no direction is emitted.
